name: Khemji Wire Product Catalogue 2026
description: Complete product catalogue with full specifications for Hot Dip Galvanized MS Wire, Cable Armouring Round Wire, and Formed Wire. Includes IS standard references, coating class tables, and tensile strength charts.

name: GI Wire IS 280 Technical Datasheet
description: Technical datasheet for Hot Dip Galvanized Mild Steel Wire as per IS 280:2006. Includes chemical composition, mechanical properties, zinc coating tables, dimensional tolerances, and testing methods.

name: Cable Armouring Round Wire IS 3975 Datasheet
description: Technical datasheet for Cable Armouring Round Wire as per IS 3975:1999. Includes 7 size specifications, resistivity limits, tensile strength ranges, and quality testing criteria.

name: Formed Wire Cable Armouring IS 3975 Datasheet
description: Technical datasheet for Formed Wire (Strip) for Cable Armouring as per IS 3975:1999. Includes dimensional properties, mechanical specifications, and application guidelines.
